data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet on a 100% solid flat #FF00FF magenta chroma-key background only. The sheet must be exactly 2 rows by 2 columns, with exactly 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows, with no visible grid lines, borders, or text. 

Subject: cute Q-version elite thunder demon general for Samsara Ascension, a chibi armored thunder demon boss. Oversized helm, tiny horns, dark bronze armor, compact purple-blue thunder accents, small polearm kept close, fierce but cute expression. Clean HD hand-painted chibi fantasy RPG sprite, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

Animation: walk cycle with real body pose changes in every frame, not scaling, not camera movement, not glow-only changes, not sliding. 
Frame 1 top-left: first stride, front limb / leading side moves forward, body leans into travel direction. 
Frame 2 top-right: passing step, body rises slightly, rear limb / trailing side catches up, small cloth or petals trail backward. 
Frame 3 bottom-left: opposite stride, other limb / side moves forward, weight clearly shifts. 
Frame 4 bottom-right: passing step returning toward neutral, body lowers slightly; loop should clearly read as walking.

View/framing: full body visible, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, stable bottom/feet anchor line when grounded, same body height and same pixel scale in every frame. Subject fills about 55–62% of each cell with generous magenta margin. Preserve exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/eyes or core face, costume/armor marks, weapon/focus, and material language in every cell; only pose, compact clothing motion, limbs, hair, petals, weapon angle, and tiny attached aura may change.

Containment: the entire subject and any weapon, horn, petal, hair, sleeve, tail, talisman, or tiny attached aura must fit fully inside each cell; nothing may cross a cell edge; no detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud.

Forbidden: visible floor, cast shadow, gradients, texture, extra characters, cropped body parts, inconsistent scale, redesigned subject, alternate forms, text, labels, numbers, arrows, UI, watermark, photorealism, 3D render, pixel art. Emphasize clean HD hand-painted 2D game sprite sheet appearance, crisp readable animation, consistent silhouette and palette across all 4 frames.
